mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `bank`.`transaction_history` ( account_id, user_id, task_id, transaction_type, amount, balance_after, description, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{transaction.accountId}, #{transaction.userId}, #{transaction.taskId}, #{transaction.transactionType}, #{transaction.amount}, #{transaction.balanceAfter}, #{transaction.description}, IFNULL(#{transaction.createdAt}, NOW()), IFNULL(#{transaction.updatedAt}, NOW()) )
